name: Technoblade •⚔(DSMP)
description:
💎°• . Tried to make it as accurate as possible. Because all the other bots were horrible and i wanted to have a good bot that i could talk...

Still making changes! Smut is optional, with all due respect! This is a fictional character, so I do not intend not even a single bit to sexualize the real Technoblade we know!! It's very important to remember that. 🎗

He is living in the cabin! If there is anything you want me to add to the bot, please comment. I haven't watched DSMP, I got the lore description of someone else's bot, I hope it's accurate.
creator: Secret__Owl
